_notes.purpose: Optional Mariners coverage gap-filler. Email/calendar backfill recovered 37 Mariners games but distribution is uneven (2021 is 0 despite increased attendance starting then). If you want fuller coverage, edit this file with the years you attended most/all home games.
_notes.format_recommendation: Mariners ticket purchases mostly recoverable from email trails (you buy your own tickets). The gap is more likely individual missed purchases than a season-wide pattern. Two options below — pick whichever matches reality:
_notes.option_a_per_game: Per-game entries for specific dates you remember: { event_date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', event_type: 'mlb_game', team_id: 136, opponent: 'Astros', is_home: true, notes: 'where you sat / who you went with' }
_notes.option_b_season_shorthand: Aggressive coverage: { event_type: 'mlb_game', team_id: 136, season: YYYY, attendance: 'all_home', exceptions: [<dates not attended>] }. WARNING: 81 home games per season — if you attended e.g. half, listing 40 exceptions is a lot. Per-game might be saner unless attendance was truly comprehensive.
